mapper.select: SELECT * FROM work_schedule_classes ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT * FROM work_schedule_classes WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_schedule_classes (name, work_location, address, station, telephone, section_name, folder_name, tags, is_active, max_hours, min_hours, start_time, end_time, break_start_time, break_end_time, break_start_time_2, break_end_time_2, break_start_time_3, break_end_time_3, break_start_time_4, break_end_time_4, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{name}, #{workLocation}, #{address}, #{station}, #{telephone}, #{sectionName}, #{folderName}, #{tags}, #{isActive}, #{maxHours}, #{minHours}, #{startTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{endTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{breakStartTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{breakEndTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{breakStartTime2, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{breakEndTime2, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{breakStartTime3, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{breakEndTime3, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{breakStartTime4, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{breakEndTime4, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE work_schedule_classes SET name = #{name}, work_location = #{workLocation}, address = #{address}, station = #{station}, telephone = #{telephone}, section_name = #{sectionName}, folder_name = #{folderName}, tags = #{tags}, is_active = #{isActive}, max_hours = #{maxHours}, min_hours = #{minHours}, start_time = #{startTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, end_time = #{endTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, break_start_time = #{breakStartTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, break_end_time = #{breakEndTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, break_start_time_2 = #{breakStartTime2, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, break_end_time_2 = #{breakEndTime2, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, break_start_time_3 = #{breakStartTime3, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, break_end_time_3 = #{breakEndTime3, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, break_start_time_4 = #{breakStartTime4, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, break_end_time_4 = #{breakEndTime4, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE class_id = #{classId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM work_schedule_classes WHERE name = #{name})
